Container.Name: Gitea
Container.Overview:
Gitea is a painless self-hosted Git service. It is a community-managed fork of Gogs, written in Go and licensed under the MIT license. It runs light on resources and includes issue tracking, pull requests, wikis, and integrations.
[Note: This is a community-maintained template and is not officially affiliated with Gitea.]

Config.Name: SSH Port
Config.Description: SSH port for git operations. Unraid host port 22 is usually reserved, so 2222 is recommended.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage path for configurations, databases, keys, and git repositories.

Config.Name: User UID
Config.Description: UID of the user running Gitea (Unraid default 'nobody' user is 99).

Config.Name: User GID
Config.Description: GID of the group running Gitea (Unraid default 'users' group is 100).
